race.comment: RICH LADY (11) has become a perennial placegetter but lines up well for this with Toeroek sticking. Will get a lovely trail behind the strong tempo and just needs the gap to appear. FIABESCA (9) returns and has been readied with a sharp jump-out. Is another that will tuck in behind the early speed and be sweating to burst through. ELEGANT LILLY (8) impressed with a brave pillar-to-post-win to shed her maiden tag here last start. Obviously tougher this time but will be in it for a long way. It's been over two years since SANTASIA (2) broke her maiden but she is knocking on the door and desperate to break through soon. Drawn sticky but holds claims. MRS SECOMBE (3) returns and makes her stable debut for the Bieg camp. Lost her rider when last sighted but her prior two efforts were positive. Readied with a jumpout and should make a bright return.
